source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/12. 수입검사 기준서_△/CsI/A1717MCW/A-PQCP-1-101_A1717MCW (Scintillator) Q.C 공정도_REV0_2022.12.02.xlsx

document.title: CsI Scintillator (A1717MCW) Q.C 공정도 (Process Quality Control Plan)

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev.0 process quality control plan for A1717MCW CsI Scintillator, covering incoming inspection through final inspection.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines inspection items, acceptance criteria, management frequency, sample quantity, equipment or JIG, responsible departments, management method, and inspection records for A1717MCW CsI Scintillator processes.
keyPoints: Document number is A-PQCP-1-101 and the enactment date is 2022.12.02.
Model and product family are identified as A1717MCW and A1717MCW CsI Scintillator QC 공정도.
Incoming TFT Panel inspection includes appearance and measurement criteria such as no scratch, no crack/chipping/dent, weight 430±30g, size 440*520 ±0.2mm, and thickness 0.7±0.1mm.
CsI deposition process controls include material loading, vacuum and pressure limits, heater voltages, scan count, QCM rate, deposited weight, and deposition dimensions.
Final inspection includes size, total weight, total thickness, appearance criteria, MTF, sensitivity, and defect specification checks.

evidence.claim: Incoming inspection of TFT Panel checks appearance and measurements.
evidence.evidenceText:
1,수입검사,,50,-,1-1,• TFT Panel,"• 외관 검사
• 측정 검사"

evidence.claim: Incoming TFT Panel acceptance criteria include no scratch, no crack/chipping/dent, weight 430±30g, size 440*520 ±0.2mm, and thickness 0.7 ±0.1mm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Scratch : 없을 것
• 찍힘, 얼룩 : 없을 것
• Crack, Chipping, Dent : 없을 것
• Interface Pad : 변색 없을 것
• 무게 : 430±30g
• Size : 440*520 ±0.2mm
• Thickness : 0.7 ±0.1mm

evidence.claim: CsI deposition process preparation controls CsI input amount, Tl-related material weight, Quartz Crystal lifetime, resistance, sensor limits, pumping vacuum, recipe number, and Cryo open time.
evidence.evidenceText:
• CsI 투입량 : Panel 1매/2kg, 2매/3kg, 3매/5kg
• TI Boat + TL원료 = 45.5±1g
• Quartz Crystal Life Time : Activity 값 600이상
• 증착기 Pumping :
 - Pumping완료후 진공 도달 - 9E^-06Torr 이하
• 예열 Recipe No 기록
• Cryo Open Time :
 - Main Chamber 50min 이하
 - LL Chamber 10Min 이하

evidence.claim: CsI deposition scanning is marked as CTQ.
evidence.evidenceText:
[CsI 증착 공정]
Scanning",,-,-,5-4,• CsI 증착기 M/C,• 외관 검사,CTQ

evidence.claim: CsI deposition scanning criteria include heater voltage limits, center T.C temperature criterion, and 3,300 scan count at 300mm/sec.
evidence.evidenceText:
• TI Line Heater 전압 : 29% Power 기준 24.5±1V
• 센터 Heater 전압 : 50% Power 기준 70.0±2V
• 도가니 T.C 온도: 센터 T.C 765℃ 기준 705±15℃
• Scan 횟수 : 300mm/sec 속도 기준 3,300회

evidence.claim: CsI deposition burning criterion is QCM Rate 3Å/sec or less.
evidence.evidenceText:
[CsI 증착 공정]
Burning",,-,-,5-5,• CsI 증착기 M/C,• 외관 검사,-,• QCM Rate 수치 : 3Å/sec 이하 도달

evidence.claim: Thickness measurement checks TD and MD directions with CsI thickness 300±20um and uniformity under 5%.
evidence.evidenceText:
• TD방향 :
 - 9Point 측정, 두께 300±20um/Uniformity 〈 5%
• MD방향 :
 - 8Point 측정 (TD와 겹침에 따른 중앙 5번 제외)
 CsI 두께 300±20um / Uniformity 〈 5%

evidence.claim: Final inspection measurement criteria include size 440*520 ±0.2mm, total weight 650g±50g, and total thickness 1.4mm±0.1mm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 측정 검사 항목 & SPEC
 1) Size : 440*520 ±0.2mm
 2) Total Weight : 650g±50g
 3) Total Thickness : 1.4mm±0.1mm

evidence.claim: Final operating inspection records MTF and Sensitivity under RQA5 conditions.
evidence.evidenceText:
• MTF & DQE & Sensitivity
 - RQA5 조건 (SID 150cm, 70kv, mA, mSec, mAs)
 - MTF & Sensitivity 측정 결과 기록

evidence.claim: Final operating inspection requires MTF values of 84 or more at 0.5 lp/mm, 62 or more at 1.0 lp/mm, 30 or more at 2.0 lp/mm, and 16 or more at 3.0 lp/mm.
Final operating inspection requires CsI sensitivity of at least 165 lsb/uGy.
Final operating inspection defect specification allows total line defect of 10 lines or less, line gap of at least 10 lines, allowable defect class Class 6, and 3x3 stain of 2 or less.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Defect SPEC
 - Total Line defect : ≤ 10 Line
 - Line Gap between : ≥ 10 Line
 - Allowable Defect Class : Class 6
 - 3x3 Stain : ≤ 2ea

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source metadata authoritySignal is general, while the text only identifies ㈜ 에이치엔아비즈 and 품질팀 rather than an external regulatory authority or jurisdiction.
No external standards are explicitly identified; RQA5 appears as an inspection condition rather than a cited standard.
Source text has table/OCR artifacts and inconsistent terms such as TI/TL/TlI and malformed text including '쳬결' and duplicated table headers.
Cooling criterion contains potentially conflicting evidence: 'Cooling : 40Min 이상 -> 작업지도서 2시간 이상'.
